title: Google Sign-In - Verify successful login using a valid Google account
description: Tests the complete happy path for the alternative Google Sign-In method.
preconditions: User has a valid Google account configured on the device.
User is on the Login screen.

steps.description: 2. Verify the Google Sign-In system dialog appears.
3. Select a valid Google account from the list.
4. Complete the authentication process if required.
5. Verify a loading indicator is shown.
6. Verify the user is successfully logged in and navigated to the Home screen.

expected_result: User is authenticated via Google and redirected to the Home screen.
